title: AGP common types
description: Shared definitions reused across AGP message schemas. v0.1.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this specific message kind. Independent of agp_version.

iso8601_utc.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 timestamp in UTC. MUST end with 'Z'.

event_id.description: Prefixed ULID identifying an event. Unique per vendor.

trace_id.description: Prefixed ULID identifying a trace across multiple events.

decision_request_id.description: Prefixed ULID identifying a real-time decision request (Flow C).

agent_id.description: Vendor-scoped identifier for an agent. Opaque to the plane.

vendor_id.description: FQDN identifying the vendor (e.g. anthropic.com). Authoritative form is the vendor's registry record.

human_principal.description: SHA-256-derived hash of the upstream user identifier. Plaintext user IDs MUST NOT appear here.

hash_ref.description: Algorithm-prefixed hex hash. Only sha256 is permitted in v0.1.

key_id.description: Identifier matching a public key entry in the actor's discovery document.

signature.description: Ed25519 detached signature with bound key_id and alg. See ADR 0001.

value.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature (64 raw bytes -> 88 base64 chars including padding).

signature.description-when-signed: When verifying, signature.value MUST be present. The value field is omitted only during the canonical signing-input construction (see ADR 0001).

decision.description: Per-action decision applied by the vendor.

action_type.description: Canonical action types. Unknown types MUST be ignored by L1 receivers but logged.
